name: KFC Cole Slaw#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss cabbage lightly with sugar, carrots, salt, and pepper.
2. Drench all ingredients with milk. Cover and refrigerate for about 15 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, combine mayo, buttermilk, celery seed, hot pepper sauce, and onion in a bowl. Mix well with the cabbage mixture.
4. Refrigerate again for at least 1 hour before serving.
5. Drain some of the liquid before serving, as it settles over time.
6. The slaw will keep for up to 24 hours.
